artifacts.verificationNotes: Official keyword/news listing includes interviews, events, and research stories; it is useful for discovery context but not binding policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Une charte Intelligence Artificielle (IA) generative, en cours de redaction, encadrera les usages de l'IA et sera disponible sur l'intranet des que validee par le Conseil d'Administration.
artifacts.notes: This is an official source but predates the approved March 2026 AI charter and does not itself state the current AI-use rules.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: The page lists official INSA Lyon AI-related events, research articles, and a Feb. 2026 interview noting that a generative AI charter was voted and deployed since March 2026.
artifacts.notes: Useful discovery context, but not used for binding policy claims because the page is a news/topic listing.

methodsAttempted.notes: Scoped discovery to official INSA Lyon web properties.

methodsAttempted.query: INSA Lyon charte usage IAG CA 20260305 point 6.1

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one current, CA-approved generative AI use charter. The IT charter and AI keyword page were retained as discovery context but rejected as direct evidence for current binding AI-policy claims.

targets.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon

stopConditions: Use only official INSA Lyon public sources.
Do not bypass login walls, paywalls, CAPTCHAs, robots restrictions, or WAF restrictions.
Do not treat news, events, research showcases, or stale references as binding policy evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon

artifacts.claimText: INSA Lyon has a Conseil d'Administration-approved generative AI use charter dated March 5, 2026, and the charter states that it is an annex to the institution's internal regulations and applies to the whole INSA Lyon community.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a staged candidate because the source is an official INSA Lyon CA deliberation and charter. This does not publish a canonical claim.

artifacts.claimText: INSA Lyon's generative AI charter says any use of generative AI for productions such as academic work, scientific publications, notes, and administrative documents must be documented transparently with the model/version, date, context, prompts, and purposes.

citation.citationTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Toute utilisation d'IAG pour une production (livrables, travaux academiques, publications scientifiques, notes, documents administratifs ...) doit etre documentee de maniere transparente : modele et version, date, contexte, prompts utilises et finalites de chacun.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Use of generative AI for productions must be transparently documented, including model/version, date, context, prompts, and purposes.

artifacts.notes: Claim uses mandatory language because the French source says 'doit etre documentee'.

artifacts.claimText: INSA Lyon's generative AI charter says use of generative AI tools to process personal, strategic, or confidential data is conditioned on prior institutional validation, and that uncontracted online generative AI services are prohibited for processing personal data.

citation.citationTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: L'utilisation d'outils d'IAG pour traiter des donnees personnelles, strategiques ou confidentielles est conditionnee a une validation prealable par l'etablissement. ... Il est interdit d'utiliser des services IAG en ligne non contractuellement encadres pour traiter des donnees personnelles.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Processing personal, strategic, or confidential data with generative AI requires prior institutional validation; uncontracted online services are prohibited for personal data.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 2.3 Preserver la securite des donnees

artifacts.notes: Claim combines two adjacent mandatory data-handling rules from the same charter section without extending them beyond the source.

artifacts.claimText: For INSA Lyon academic evaluations, the generative AI charter says use of generative AI is prohibited unless the teacher gives express instructions, and any violation is treated as fraud and sanctioned under the study regulations and education code.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Dans le cadre des evaluations academiques, l'utilisation d'une IAG est interdite sauf consigne expresse de l'enseignant. Toute infraction sera assimilee a une fraude et sanctionnee conformement au reglement des etudes et au code de l'education.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: In academic evaluations, generative AI use is prohibited unless expressly instructed by the teacher; violations are treated as fraud and sanctioned.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 4.2, Usage dans les evaluations academiques

artifacts.claimText: INSA Lyon's generative AI charter encourages teachers to specify, for each pedagogical activity, whether generative AI use is authorized, tolerated with conditions, or forbidden; if no teacher instruction is provided, the general charter applies.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d'usage de l'intelligence artificielle generative de l'INSA Lyon
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Les enseignants sont encourages a accompagner les etudiants dans une appropriation critique et responsable de ces outils, et a specifier dans chaque activite pedagogique ce qui est autorise, tolere sous conditions, ou interdit en matiere d'usage d'IAG. ... Si aucune consigne n'est fournie par l'enseignant, le cadre general defini dans la presente charte s'applique.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Teachers are encouraged to specify AI-use rules for each pedagogical activity; absent teacher instructions, the general charter applies.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Section 4.2 Exemples non exhaustifs de cas d'usage pour les enseignants

artifacts.notes: Claim uses advisory language for the teacher instruction part because the source says 'encourages', while preserving the stated default rule when no instruction is provided.

artifacts.claimText: For INSA Lyon research and innovation activities, the generative AI charter says confidential peer-review documents require vigilance around strategic information and that, when confidentiality applies, generative AI use is prohibited.

artifacts.title: INSA Lyon generative AI charter staged crawl
artifacts.summary: Official INSA Lyon discovery found a Conseil d'Administration-approved March 5, 2026 generative AI use charter. Staged claims cover the charter status, transparency requirement, data-security restrictions, academic-evaluation rule, teacher activity-level guidance, and confidential research review handling. The IT charter and AI keyword page were rejected as direct policy evidence because they were stale/contextual or news/event material.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Only public official INSA Lyon sources were used; intranet-only deployment materials, if any, were not accessed.
The staged claims are candidate claims only and are not marked canonical or human-reviewed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
